Program Overview
Accredited & aligned to the
DANB (RDA), AMT & AMCA standards

Master the chairside

As a dental assistant, you'll work chairside alongside dentists and hygienists in dental offices and clinics. Our online dental assistant program teaches the clinical and lab skills that matter on the job.

You'll learn dental and oral anatomy, infection control and sterilization, chairside assisting, moisture control, dental radiography, restorative and esthetic materials, impressions and lab procedures — plus quality patient care.

After finishing, you'll be ready to take the DANB Registered Dental Assistant (RDA) exam and/or the AMT & AMCA exams — nationally recognized credentials that open more job options and room to advance.

Enroll Today
